tooltip.antarchy.signal_saving_bulb: Toggles on/off. Has light level equal to the signal strength stored on it.
tooltip.antarchy.nightmare_sword: Deals more damage as your health drops.
tooltip.antarchy.primordial_armor_set_bo: Full Set: Attacks ignore enemy knockback resistance
item.antarchy.duct_tape.tooltip: Place down and right-click to repair tools
item.antarchy.blood_crystal_armor.toolti: Grants a Bloodglass Heart that blocks one incoming hit, shatters, then recharges.
item.antarchy.blood_crystal_boots.toolti: Cancels fall damage when falling upward while gravity is inverted.
item.antarchy.blood_crystal_apple.toolti: Grants Bloodglass Ward, providing temporary Bloodglass Hearts that recharge while the effect lasts.
tooltip.antarchy.blood_crystal_katana.tr: Leaves a crimson trail behind you.
tooltip.antarchy.jumpy_boots: Sneak to charge, then jump to spring upward.
tooltip.antarchy.brutalfly_elytra.flap: While flying, hold %s to flap your wings
tooltip.antarchy.triffid_goo_block: At high velocity bounce up, otherwise sink through.
tooltip.antarchy.scorpion_whip.lash: Lashes prey from afar and embeds a venomous tether.
tooltip.antarchy.scorpion_whip.snap: Left-click tethered prey again to snap the stinger free.
tooltip.antarchy.fallen_king_crown.hero: Grants Hero of the Village when you slay hostile mobs
item.antarchy.ultimate_crossbow.capacity: Loads up to 16 arrows at once
tooltip.antarchy.shrink_ray: Permanently shrinks targets. Hold down to charge.
tooltip.antarchy.growth_ray: Permanently Grows Targets. Hold down to charge.
tooltip.antarchy.reverie_bottle.capture: Right click a Reverie with a glass bottle to store it.
tooltip.antarchy.reverie_bottle.release: Right click to release the Reverie.
item.antarchy.enchanted_golden_apple_cow: Enchanted Golden Apple Cow Spawn Egg
message.antarchy.brown_ant_activated: The brown ant is ready to open its destination.
message.antarchy.brown_ant_needs_reagent: This brown ant needs a reagent before it can open its destination.
message.antarchy.rainbow_ant_activated: The rainbow ant hums with a new Infinity destination.
message.antarchy.rainbow_ant_activated_i: The rainbow ant hums with an inherited Infinity destination.
The rainbow ant reconnects to an inherited Infinity destination.
message.antarchy.rainbow_ant_failed_dime: Failed to create dimension. This likely means something is wrong in your infinity config. Restart/Relog and try again.
message.antarchy.rainbow_ant_infinity_mi: Infinity must be installed for rainbow ant dimensions to work.
message.antarchy.rainbow_ant_needs_reage: This rainbow ant needs a reagent before it can open a dimension.
message.antarchy.red_ant_activated: The red ant is ready to open its destination.
message.antarchy.red_ant_needs_reagent: This red ant needs a reagent before it can open its destination.
message.antarchy.termite_activated: The termite is ready to open its destination.
message.antarchy.termite_needs_reagent: This termite needs a reagent before it can open its destination.
advancements.antarchy.hey_listen.title: Hey Listen
death.attack.triffid_mauling: %1$s was mauled to death by a plant
death.attack.triffid_mauling.player: %1$s was mauled to death by a plant
tooltip.antarchy.big_bertha.mode.basilis: Right-click paralyzes a target. Hits inflict poison and slow.
tooltip.antarchy.big_bertha.mode.lucid: Hits invert targets for a few seconds. Hits deal more damage while you are inverted.
tooltip.antarchy.big_bertha.mode.nightma: Players suffer Dread; hits inflict weakness.
tooltip.antarchy.big_bertha.mode.kraken: Hits slam targets back and call lightning.
tooltip.antarchy.big_bertha.mode.molevor: Right-click to spin forward and drill through Molevore blocks.
tooltip.antarchy.moggles.reveal: Gives night vision and points to nearby caves.
tooltip.antarchy.moggles.underground: Works only while you have no sky access.
tooltip.antarchy.gravity_gun.primary: Left-click: blast nearby entities or throw the held target.
tooltip.antarchy.gravity_gun.secondary: Right-click: pull in an entity or a valid block.
tooltip.antarchy.gravity_gun.scroll: Hold Ctrl and scroll to move the held target closer or farther away.
tooltip.antarchy.gravity_gun.blacklist: Does not affect blacklisted blocks or entities.
tooltip.antarchy.rainbow_sugar: Activates Rainbow Ant Dimensions. Eat while in one to return home.
advancements.antarchy.visit_elythia.desc: Use a brown ant to reach Elythia.
advancements.antarchy.visit_thoraxis.des: Use a red ant to reach Thoraxis.
advancements.antarchy.fallen_kingdom_cas: I Used to Rule the World...
Chunks would load when I gave the word...
advancements.antarchy.visit_cavaryn.desc: Use a termite to reach Cavaryn.
advancements.antarchy.the_lab.title: Hello Everyone, Dan Here!

advancements.antarchy.whoever_smelt_it_d: Get Stinky for the first time.

advancements.antarchy.brutalfly.title: Float Like a Brutalfly, Sting Like a Bee
